entries.name: Connected With
entries.formalDefinition: Primitive per spec §3.4; defining content supplied by property characteristics (owl:SymmetricProperty + owl:ReflexiveProperty per spec §3.4 line 295) + bridgeAxioms field's reflexivity + symmetry + parthood-extension forms per spec §3.4.1 ratified axiom set. Path-fence-authored at Q-4-Step5-A 2026-05-14 (Phase 4 mid-phase architectural-gap micro-cycle 2/~3).
entries.notes: Connected With per spec §3.4 ratified canonical IRI cco:ont00001810. Verified against CommonCoreOntologies/CommonCoreOntologies@develop/src/cco-modules/ExtendedRelationOntology.ttl at Pass 2b vendoring-analog-time 2026-05-15: cco: prefix maps to https://www.commoncoreontologies.org/ (per @prefix declaration); canonical CCO definition restricts domain + range to Immaterial Entity (`x is_connected_with y iff x and y are both instances of Immaterial Entity and there exists an instance of Immaterial Entity z that is part of both x and y`). Bridge axiom semantics emitted via bridgeAxioms field below per Q-4-Step5-A.2 schema extension.

bridgeAxioms.comment: Connected With reflexivity per spec §3.4.1 ratified axiom set line 307: C(X, X). Emitter expansion (per Q-4-Step5-A.2.1 architect ruling 2026-05-14 + ADR-007 §11 FOL→Prolog per-variant translation table): ∀x. C(x, x).
bridgeAxioms.sourceReference: BFO 2020 / CCO mereotopology; spec §3.4.1 line 307 ratified reflexivity axiom
bridgeAxioms.notes: Path-fence-authored 2026-05-14 per Q-4-Step5-A.2 + Q-4-Step5-A.2.1 architect rulings; discriminated-union schema shape with axiomForm enum per Q-4-Step5-A.2.1 ruling.

bridgeAxioms.comment: Connected With symmetry per spec §3.4.1 ratified axiom set line 308: C(X, Y) :- C(Y, X). Emitter expansion: ∀x,y. C(y, x) → C(x, y). This axiom + the owl:SymmetricProperty characteristic on cco:ont00001810 (per spec §3.4 line 295) are semantically equivalent; the ARC content's bridgeAxioms field is the canonical emission surface per Q-4-Step5-A.2 ruling, independent of OWL Property Characteristic handling.
bridgeAxioms.sourceReference: BFO 2020 / CCO mereotopology; spec §3.4.1 line 308 ratified symmetry axiom
bridgeAxioms.notes: Path-fence-authored 2026-05-14 per Q-4-Step5-A.2 + Q-4-Step5-A.2.1 architect rulings. Composability with Phase 1 emitter's owl:SymmetricProperty handling is Q-4-Step5-A.4 Developer reconnaissance scope (potential double-emit concern: if Phase 1 emits symmetry from owl:SymmetricProperty AND bridgeAxioms emits symmetry, the lifted FOL would contain two structurally-identical axioms — Q-4-Step5-A.4 reconnaissance identifies the gap if any).

bridgeAxioms.comment: Connected With parthood-extension bridge per spec §3.4.1 ratified axiom set line 309: C(Z, Y) :- P(X, Y), C(Z, X). Emitter expansion: ∀x,y,z. P(x, y) ∧ C(z, x) → C(z, y). This is the spec-named 'bridge axiom' (spec §3.4 line 296) — propagates connection through parthood chains; the load-bearing semantic surface for BFO mereotopological closure per spec §3.4.1's 'bridge composes with parthood transitivity' framing. parthoodPredicate field names the P predicate (obo:BFO_0000176 = continuant_part_of); the predicate field names the C predicate (cco:ont00001810).
bridgeAxioms.sourceReference: BFO 2020 / CCO mereotopology; spec §3.4 line 296 + spec §3.4.1 line 309 ratified parthood-extension bridge axiom
bridgeAxioms.notes: Path-fence-authored 2026-05-14 per Q-4-Step5-A.2 + Q-4-Step5-A.2.1 architect rulings. This axiom composes with Step 3's parthood transitivity emission (already shipped at commit dab9e0b) — the spec §3.4.1 worked example demonstrates: P(boundary_1, region_a) + P(region_a, region_b) + C(observer, boundary_1) entails C(observer, region_b) via transitivity + parthood-extension composition (spec §3.4.1 lines 313-330). Cycle-guard per ADR-013 visited-ancestor pattern handles the cycle-prone parthood predicate class.

disjointnessAxioms.name: Continuant_Occurrent_root
disjointnessAxioms.comment: Root BFO Disjointness Map commitment: Continuant ⊓ Occurrent = ⊥. The top-level Entity (BFO_0000001) partition into temporally-persistent Continuants and temporally-extended Occurrents.
disjointnessAxioms.notes: Verified against loaded BFO 2020 in triplestore

disjointnessAxioms.name: Continuant_subkinds
disjointnessAxioms.comment: Continuant sub-partition: IndependentContinuant ⊓ SpecificallyDependentContinuant ⊓ GenericallyDependentContinuant pairwise disjoint. Ternary N-ary; expands to 3 pairwise binary FOL axioms per Q-4-Step4-A.1 ruling.
disjointnessAxioms.sourceReference: BFO 2020 ISO/IEC 21838-2; bfo-2020.owl DisjointClasses(BFO_0000004 BFO_0000020 BFO_0000031)
disjointnessAxioms.notes: Verified against loaded BFO 2020 in triplestore

disjointnessAxioms.name: IndependentContinuant_material_immaterial
disjointnessAxioms.notes: Verified against loaded BFO 2020 in triplestore

disjointnessAxioms.name: MaterialEntity_subkinds
disjointnessAxioms.comment: MaterialEntity sub-partition: Object ⊓ ObjectAggregate ⊓ FiatObjectPart pairwise disjoint. Ternary N-ary.
disjointnessAxioms.sourceReference: BFO 2020 ISO/IEC 21838-2; bfo-2020.owl DisjointClasses(BFO_0000030 BFO_0000027 BFO_0000024)
disjointnessAxioms.notes: Verified against loaded BFO 2020 in triplestore

disjointnessAxioms.name: ImmaterialEntity_subkinds
disjointnessAxioms.comment: ImmaterialEntity sub-partition: ContinuantFiatBoundary ⊓ SpatialRegion ⊓ Site pairwise disjoint. Ternary N-ary.
disjointnessAxioms.sourceReference: BFO 2020 ISO/IEC 21838-2; bfo-2020.owl DisjointClasses(BFO_0000140 BFO_0000006 BFO_0000029)
disjointnessAxioms.notes: Verified against loaded BFO 2020 in triplestore

disjointnessAxioms.name: ContinuantFiatBoundary_dimensions
disjointnessAxioms.comment: ContinuantFiatBoundary dimensional partition: ZeroDimensional ⊓ OneDimensional ⊓ TwoDimensional pairwise disjoint. Ternary N-ary. BFO_0000147 = zero-dimensional continuant fiat boundary; BFO_0000142 = one-dimensional continuant fiat boundary; BFO_0000146 = two-dimensional continuant fiat boundary. All three confirmed against bfo.owl at Pass 2b vendoring-analog-time fetch 2026-05-14 (rdfs:label verification + subClassOf BFO_0000140 continuant-fiat-boundary parent confirms the dimensional partition).
disjointnessAxioms.sourceReference: BFO 2020 ISO/IEC 21838-2; bfo.owl DisjointClasses for ContinuantFiatBoundary sub-partition (BFO_0000140 parent; BFO_0000147 / BFO_0000142 / BFO_0000146 the three dimensional subclasses)
disjointnessAxioms.notes: Verified against bfo.owl at Pass 2b vendoring-analog-time 2026-05-14; [VERIFY] markers flipped to canonical IRIs per binding-immediately discipline + Q-4-Step4-A canonical-sources sub-ruling

disjointnessAxioms.name: SpatialRegion_dimensions
disjointnessAxioms.comment: SpatialRegion dimensional partition: ZeroDimensional ⊓ OneDimensional ⊓ TwoDimensional ⊓ ThreeDimensional pairwise disjoint. 4-ary N-ary; expands to 6 pairwise binary FOL axioms. All 4 IRIs verified against bfo.owl at Pass 2b vendoring-analog-time 2026-05-14: BFO_0000018 = zero-dimensional spatial region; BFO_0000026 = one-dimensional spatial region; BFO_0000009 = two-dimensional spatial region; BFO_0000028 = three-dimensional spatial region (rdfs:label confirmation against canonical OWL source).
disjointnessAxioms.sourceReference: BFO 2020 ISO/IEC 21838-2; bfo.owl DisjointClasses for SpatialRegion sub-partition (BFO_0000018 / BFO_0000026 / BFO_0000009 / BFO_0000028 the four dimensional subclasses)
disjointnessAxioms.notes: Verified against bfo.owl at Pass 2b vendoring-analog-time 2026-05-14; all 4 [VERIFY] medium-confidence IRIs confirmed correct per binding-immediately discipline + Q-4-Step4-A canonical-sources sub-ruling

disjointnessAxioms.name: SpecificallyDependentContinuant_subkinds
disjointnessAxioms.notes: Verified against loaded BFO 2020 in triplestore

disjointnessAxioms.name: RealizableEntity_subkinds
disjointnessAxioms.comment: RealizableEntity sub-partition: Role ⊓ Disposition = ⊥. (Disposition has Function as sub-class per BFO 2020; the Disposition/Function relation is sub-class, not partition; not encoded as disjointness.)
disjointnessAxioms.notes: Verified against loaded BFO 2020 in triplestore

disjointnessAxioms.name: Occurrent_subkinds
disjointnessAxioms.comment: Occurrent sub-partition: Process ⊓ ProcessBoundary ⊓ TemporalRegion ⊓ SpatiotemporalRegion pairwise disjoint. 4-ary N-ary; expands to 6 pairwise binary FOL axioms per Q-4-Step4-A.1 ruling.
disjointnessAxioms.sourceReference: BFO 2020 ISO/IEC 21838-2; bfo-2020.owl DisjointClasses(BFO_0000015 BFO_0000035 BFO_0000008 BFO_0000011)
disjointnessAxioms.notes: Verified against loaded BFO 2020 in triplestore

disjointnessAxioms.name: TemporalRegion_dimensions
disjointnessAxioms.comment: TemporalRegion dimensional partition: ZeroDimensionalTemporalRegion ⊓ OneDimensionalTemporalRegion = ⊥. ZeroDimensionalTemporalRegion is the parent of TemporalInstant (BFO_0000203); OneDimensionalTemporalRegion is the parent of TemporalInterval (BFO_0000202); the Instant/Interval distinction is via dimensional partition.
disjointnessAxioms.notes: Verified against loaded BFO 2020 in triplestore
